name: NORWOOD FINANCIAL CORP
summary: . General Norwood Financial Corp (the Company), a Pennsylvania corporation, was incorporated in 1995 to become the holding company for Wayne Bank (the Bank). The Company is a registered bank holding company subject to regulation and supervision by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Federal Reserve). As of December31, 2025, the Company had total consolidated assets of $2.425billion, consolidated deposits of $2.183billion, and consolidated stockholders equity of $242.2million. T...
